THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LOUIE, EDMUND RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT NI, SHIH KUNG CHANG, LINDA $5,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $40.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,040.00, THIS JUDGMENT ASSUMES THAT PLAINTIFF CASHES THE $1,039 CHECK ISSUED TO HIM BY DEFENDANTS.
